Generated Narrative: ValueSet special-va-testing-parameters

This value set includes codes based on the following rules:

  • Include these codes as defined in http://snomed.info/sct
    CodeDisplay
    257492003Pinhole Occluder
    404645008Glare Testing
    424986007Pupil dilation
    261665006Unknown
  • Include these codes as defined in https://larfuma.github.io/fhir-eyecare-ig/CodeSystem-custom-Codes-to-be-submitted-to-SNOMED-or-LOINC
    CodeDisplay
    single-optotypesSingle Optotypes

name: Special VA testing Parameters
title: Special VA testing Parameters
description: This ValueSet contains codes to represent whether special testing parameters, such as a pinhole occluder or glare light was used during a visual acuity measurement.
copyright: This artefact includes content from SNOMED Clinical Terms® (SNOMED CT®) which is copyright of the International Health Terminology Standards Development Organisation (IHTSDO). Implementers of these artefacts must have the appropriate SNOMED CT Affiliate license.
